entity.summary: Kava ecosystem decentralized exchange and automated-market-maker protocol historically providing token swaps, liquidity pools, and incentive-based liquidity services.
entity.notes: The current original domain is no longer a usable exchange surface and displays unrelated casino and gambling-link content. CoinGecko and DefiLlama candidate sources independently preserve the Équilibre/Equilibre Finance exchange identity. HEI classifies the entity as inactive rather than dead because a first-party shutdown statement or equivalent terminal-state evidence was not recovered in this review pass.

evidence.title: Équilibre Finance original domain current state
evidence.notes: Original exchange domain now displays unrelated casino and gambling-link content rather than a usable DEX interface, supporting repurposed URL status and inactive entity classification.

evidence.title: Équilibre exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Exchange candidate corpus identifies Équilibre under the equilibrefinance.com domain and corroborates the historical exchange identity.

evidence.title: Equilibre DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Equilibre as a Kava decentralized exchange; HEI consolidates accented and unaccented name representations into one entity.
